  • Overview

  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AddBooking
    Usage: addbooking [customerId] [outboundFlightId] - One-way booking addbooking [customerId] [outboundFlightId] [returnFlightId] - Round-trip booking
    AddCustomer
    Represents a AddCustomer in the flight booking system.
    AddFlight
    Represents a AddFlight in the system.
    AddFlightWindow
    Represents a AddFlightWindow in the flight booking system.
    AppUser
    Represents an authenticated user account in the flight booking system.
    AuthService
    Handles user authentication, registration, and account management.
    AuthService.AuthException
    Custom exception for auth errors.
    Booking
    Represents a flight booking with support for both one-way and round-trip reservations.
    BookingDataManager
    File format (NEW): id::custId::outboundFlightId::returnFlightId::bookingDate::pricePaid::feeCharged::status::lastUpdated::history returnFlightId can be "null" or empty for one-way bookings
    BookingHistory
    Represents a BookingHistory in the flight booking system.
    BookingHistoryDialog
    Represents a BookingHistoryDialog in the flight booking system.
    BookingStatus
    Enumeration defining BookingStatus values.
    CancelBooking
    Usage: cancel [bookingId] - User cancels their booking cancelbooking [customerId] [bookingId] - Admin cancels customer's booking
    Command
    Base interface for all CLI commands.
    CommandParser
    Represents a CommandParser in the flight booking system.
    Customer
    Represents a Customer in the flight booking system.
    CustomerDataManager
    Represents a CustomerDataManager in the flight booking system.
    DataBackup
    DataBackup provides automatic backup and rollback functionality for data files.
    DataManager
    Interface representing DataManager.
    DeleteCustomer
    Represents a DeleteCustomer in the flight booking system.
    DeleteFlight
    Represents a DeleteFlight in the flight booking system.
    Flight
    Represents a scheduled flight with passenger capacity management.
    FlightBookingSystem
    Core domain model managing all flight booking operations.
    FlightBookingSystemData
    Represents a FlightBookingSystemData in the flight booking system.
    FlightBookingSystemException
    Represents a FlightBookingSystemException in the flight booking system.
    FlightDataManager
    Represents a FlightDataManager in the flight booking system.
    Help
    Help command that displays role-based help messages.
    ListBookings
    Represents a ListBookings in the flight booking system.
    ListCustomers
    Represents a ListCustomers in the flight booking system.
    ListFlights
    Represents a ListFlights in the flight booking system.
    LoadGUI
    Represents a LoadGUI in the flight booking system.
    Login
    Represents a Login in the flight booking system.
    LoginWindow
    Represents a LoginWindow in the flight booking system.
    Logout
    Represents a Logout in the flight booking system.
    Main
    Entry point for the Flight Booking System application.
    MainWindow
    Represents a MainWindow in the flight booking system.
    ModernBackgroundPanel
    Represents a ModernBackgroundPanel in the flight booking system.
    MyBookings
    Represents a MyBookings in the flight booking system.
    MyDetails
    Represents a MyDetails in the flight booking system.
    RegisterCLI
    Represents a RegisterCLI in the flight booking system.
    RegisterWindow
    Represents a RegisterWindow in the flight booking system.
    Role
    Enumeration defining Role values.
    Session
    Represents a Session in the flight booking system.
    ShowCustomer
    Represents a ShowCustomer in the flight booking system.
    ShowFlight
    Represents a ShowFlight in the flight booking system.
    SimpleDocumentListener
    Represents a SimpleDocumentListener in the flight booking system.
    Transaction
    Transaction class to manage rollback on failure.
    UIUtil
    Represents a UIUtil in the flight booking system.
    UpdateBooking
    Command to update an existing booking to different flights.
    UserStore
    Handles persistence of user account data to file storage.
    VoidBooking
    Admin-only: void a booking without charging a cancellation fee.
